## An education worthy of SpaceX

In 2014, Elon Musk asked me to start an experimental school with him at SpaceX. The goal was to develop students who are enthralled by complexity and solving for the unknown. Synthesis offers the most innovative learning experiences from that school.

Synthesis Tutor does what school was supposed to: Show your kids that they can learn anything, and that every "boring" topic is fascinating when taught well.

Until recently, Synthesis was only available to a handful of SpaceX families. Today, our community is worldwide and growing quickly. Excited for you to be a part of it.

## Common Questions

Getting started with Tutor is free and easy.

What is the age range for Synthesis Tutor?  

**Synthesis Tutor currently covers elementary math for ages 5-11.**

However, we have seen great success for younger students who need enrichment or older students who need additional support.

Whether your child is struggling, advanced, or right on grade level, Synthesis Tutor teaches in a way that makes math make sense for everyone, no matter their age or starting point.

My child is an emerging reader. Can they still use this product?  

**Yes. The Tutor can read everything to your child.**

We offer many accommodations for emerging readers. For users under 7, all text and answer choices will automatically be read aloud. This option is available to all users and can easily be turned off or on from the settings menu.

The Tutor's voice speed can also be adjusted in the settings menu so that your child can customize the experience to fit their level and needs.

Can I use Synthesis Tutor on a tablet?  

Yes! Synthesis Tutor is available to download in the [iPad App Store.](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/synthesis-tutor/id6448335635)

You can also run Synthesis Tutor on your desktop or computer, including Chromebooks. Android tablet support is currently in the works.

Is Synthesis Tutor AI?  

Synthesis Tutor leverages AI where appropriate while relying on our team of expert educators and neuroscientists to handle much of the pedagogy and interactive experiences.

We can guarantee the best results because we do not simply outsource your child’s education teaching to an LLM. We comb over the experiences to ensure every lesson and interaction is of the highest quality.

In short, it is not Chat-GPT. It is much better.

How will the system evaluate student progress?  

The system evaluates student progress in real time with "micro-assessments" present in every lesson, constantly checking for student understanding before moving on to new material.

Our model is continuous assessment vs. a one-time test. Your child will move on in a lesson or unit once they demonstrate they have understood and mastered the material being taught.

We also send weekly progress emails that will include AI generated summaries of your child’s progress throughout the week, including specifics on where they struggled and where they triumphed.

Will Synthesis Tutor help neurodiverse students?  

Yes. We hear it over and over again.

Synthesis Tutor is a blessing for neurodiverse and neuro-atypical students.

Dyslexia, dyscalculia, ASD, ADHD, 2E — the Tutor is highly effective at making math relatable, understandable, and fun.

Our most passionate and pleased customers are those with neurodiverse and neuro-atypical children. The Tutor's warm, gentle, and multi-sensory approach is highly effective for these students.

If you are looking for a way to get your neurodiverse child to learn and say goodbye to math anxiety, Synthesis Tutor is the perfect solution.

Can I get Synthesis Tutor for my classroom or school?  

Yes. We are now available for classrooms, schools, homeschooling pods, school districts and more.

Please indicate your interest by filling out this [form](https://synthesisschool.typeform.com/to/hk88LguS) and our team will be in touch shortly.

Is Synthesis Tutor available in other languages?  

We are in the process of translating Synthesis Tutor into other languages.

If you have a particular language you would like for Synthesis Tutor, please let us know.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61254e5d00ea9e494d66b322/64ff9ee0c691ffa4575d2176_Synthesis%20Teams%20Logo%20White.svg)

Schools fail to prepare kids for the real world.

At Synthesis, kids play games that give them real experience being leaders, decision-makers, and critical thinkers. Ages 8-14.

## Common Questions

Getting started with Tutor is free and easy.

What is the age range for Synthesis Tutor?  

**Synthesis Tutor currently covers elementary math for ages 5-11.**

However, we have seen great success for younger students who need enrichment or older students who need additional support.

Whether your child is struggling, advanced, or right on grade level, Synthesis Tutor teaches in a way that makes math make sense for everyone, no matter their age or starting point.

My child is an emerging reader. Can they still use this product?  

**Yes. The Tutor can read everything to your child.**

We offer many accommodations for emerging readers. For users under 7, all text and answer choices will automatically be read aloud. This option is available to all users and can easily be turned off or on from the settings menu.

The Tutor's voice speed can also be adjusted in the settings menu so that your child can customize the experience to fit their level and needs.

Can I use Synthesis Tutor on a tablet?  

Yes! Synthesis Tutor is available to download in the [iPad App Store.](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/synthesis-tutor/id6448335635)

You can also run Synthesis Tutor on your desktop or computer, including Chromebooks. Android tablet support is currently in the works.

Is Synthesis Tutor AI?  

Synthesis Tutor leverages AI where appropriate while relying on our team of expert educators and neuroscientists to handle much of the pedagogy and interactive experiences.

We can guarantee the best results because we do not simply outsource your child’s education teaching to an LLM. We comb over the experiences to ensure every lesson and interaction is of the highest quality.

In short, it is not Chat-GPT. It is much better.

How will the system evaluate student progress?  

The system evaluates student progress in real time with "micro-assessments" present in every lesson, constantly checking for student understanding before moving on to new material.

Our model is continuous assessment vs. a one-time test. Your child will move on in a lesson or unit once they demonstrate they have understood and mastered the material being taught.

We also send weekly progress emails that will include AI generated summaries of your child’s progress throughout the week, including specifics on where they struggled and where they triumphed.

Will Synthesis Tutor help neurodiverse students?  

Yes. We hear it over and over again.

Synthesis Tutor is a blessing for neurodiverse and neuro-atypical students.

Dyslexia, dyscalculia, ASD, ADHD, 2E — the Tutor is highly effective at making math relatable, understandable, and fun.

Our most passionate and pleased customers are those with neurodiverse and neuro-atypical children. The Tutor's warm, gentle, and multi-sensory approach is highly effective for these students.

If you are looking for a way to get your neurodiverse child to learn and say goodbye to math anxiety, Synthesis Tutor is the perfect solution.

Can I get Synthesis Tutor for my classroom or school?  

Yes. We are now available for classrooms, schools, homeschooling pods, school districts and more.

Please indicate your interest by filling out this [form](https://synthesisschool.typeform.com/to/hk88LguS) and our team will be in touch shortly.

Is Synthesis Tutor available in other languages?  

We are in the process of translating Synthesis Tutor into other languages.

If you have a particular language you would like for Synthesis Tutor, please let us know.

## An education worthy of SpaceX

In 2014, Elon Musk asked me to start an experimental school with him at SpaceX. The goal was to develop students who are enthralled by complexity and solving for the unknown. Synthesis offers the most innovative learning experiences from that school.

Synthesis Tutor does what school was supposed to: Show your kids that they can learn anything, and that every "boring" topic is fascinating when taught well.

Until recently, Synthesis was only available to a handful of SpaceX families. Today, our community is worldwide and growing quickly. Excited for you to be a part of it.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61254e5d00ea9e494d66b322/638e1ddda986f427c069b750_josh-pic.webp)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61254e5d00ea9e494d66b322/64791c56cceb90f5e86de31e_josh%20signature.png)

Josh Dahn

Cofounder, Synthesis

[Try it for free Try it for free ](https://tutor.synthesis.com/signup)

[Try it for free ](https://tutor.synthesis.com/signup?continue%5Fsignup=true)

No credit card necessary

## Common Questions

Getting started with Tutor is free and easy.

What is the age range for Synthesis Tutor?  

**Synthesis Tutor currently covers elementary math for ages 5-11.**

However, we have seen great success for younger students who need enrichment or older students who need additional support.

Whether your child is struggling, advanced, or right on grade level, Synthesis Tutor teaches in a way that makes math make sense for everyone, no matter their age or starting point.

My child is an emerging reader. Can they still use this product?  

**Yes. The Tutor can read everything to your child.**

We offer many accommodations for emerging readers. For users under 7, all text and answer choices will automatically be read aloud. This option is available to all users and can easily be turned off or on from the settings menu.

The Tutor's voice speed can also be adjusted in the settings menu so that your child can customize the experience to fit their level and needs.

Can I use Synthesis Tutor on a tablet?  

Yes! Synthesis Tutor is available to download in the [iPad App Store.](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/synthesis-tutor/id6448335635)

You can also run Synthesis Tutor on your desktop or computer, including Chromebooks. Android tablet support is currently in the works.

Is Synthesis Tutor AI?  

Synthesis Tutor leverages AI where appropriate while relying on our team of expert educators and neuroscientists to handle much of the pedagogy and interactive experiences.

We can guarantee the best results because we do not simply outsource your child’s education teaching to an LLM. We comb over the experiences to ensure every lesson and interaction is of the highest quality.

In short, it is not Chat-GPT. It is much better.

How will the system evaluate student progress?  

The system evaluates student progress in real time with "micro-assessments" present in every lesson, constantly checking for student understanding before moving on to new material.

Our model is continuous assessment vs. a one-time test. Your child will move on in a lesson or unit once they demonstrate they have understood and mastered the material being taught.

We also send weekly progress emails that will include AI generated summaries of your child’s progress throughout the week, including specifics on where they struggled and where they triumphed.

Will Synthesis Tutor help neurodiverse students?  

Yes. We hear it over and over again.

Synthesis Tutor is a blessing for neurodiverse and neuro-atypical students.

Common Questions

Getting started with Tutor is free and easy.
What is the age range for Synthesis Tutor?

Synthesis Tutor currently covers elementary math for ages 5-11.

However, we have seen great success for younger students who need enrichment or older students who need additional support.

Whether your child is struggling, advanced, or right on grade level, Synthesis Tutor teaches in a way that makes math make sense for everyone, no matter their age or starting point.

My child is an emerging reader. Can they still use this product?

Yes. The Tutor can read everything to your child.

We offer many accommodations for emerging readers. For users under 7, all text and answer choices will automatically be read aloud. This option is available to all users and can easily be turned off or on from the settings menu.

The Tutor's voice speed can also be adjusted in the settings menu so that your child can customize the experience to fit their level and needs.

Can I use Synthesis Tutor on a tablet?

Yes! Synthesis Tutor is available to download in the iPad App Store.

You can also run Synthesis Tutor on your desktop or computer, including Chromebooks.  Android tablet support is currently in the works.

Is Synthesis Tutor AI?

Synthesis Tutor leverages AI where appropriate while relying on our team of expert educators and neuroscientists to handle much of the pedagogy and interactive experiences.

We can guarantee the best results because we do not simply outsource your child’s education teaching to an LLM. We comb over the experiences to ensure every lesson and interaction is of the highest quality.

In short, it is not Chat-GPT. It is much better.

How will the system evaluate student progress?

The system evaluates student progress in real time with "micro-assessments" present in every lesson, constantly checking for student understanding before moving on to new material.

Our model is continuous assessment vs. a one-time test. Your child will move on in a lesson or unit once they demonstrate they have understood and mastered the material being taught.

We also send weekly progress emails that will include AI generated summaries of your child’s progress throughout the week, including specifics on where they struggled and where they triumphed.

Will Synthesis Tutor help neurodiverse students?

Synthesis Tutor is a blessing for neurodiverse and neuro-atypical students.
